resources.string: Built-in communication system, reminders, engagements tools, analytics and dashboards all in one place.
Providing real-time mobile access to surveys, reports and discussions from any mobile device.
Measure your recruiting, referrals and participation efforts by having easy access to growth and attrition statistics.
Choose from a variety of rewards options to compensate your customers for their participation and promote using social media.

string-array.name: ms_texts
string-array.item: Take survey on your mobile and earn great rewards.
Tell companies what you think. Test new products. Share your opinions.
Get point for each survey you take. Receive additional points for inviting your friends to MyPinion.

resources.string: Your Panel Access Code is the Unique Identification Number/Text for your respective Panel. If you don\'t have it yet, please contact your Panel Admin for the correct access code.
